must_detect.matched_text:
Confidential Term Sheet — Project LARK | EU Issuer: Nuvoria Grid Systems SE (Valmeron Paris Regulated Market) — Date: 06 Jun 2026
Proposed €180m senior unsecured convertible notes due 2031 and option to acquire SolvaBright s.r.l. (private) for €95–€110m; not announced; inside information per MAR Art 7; d i s c l o s u r e delay intended under Art 17(4).
Indicated coupon 3.00–3.50%, initial conversion premium 27–32%; price-sensitive if terms deviate >5% of last close; sole global coordinator: Brunn & Kelter Banque S.A.
Conditions precedent: approval of an EU prospectus by the home NCA (Autorité des Marchés Hexagonaux, AMH); publication via the Officially Appointed Mechanism (OAM) prior to pricing (Valmeron portal); expected T+15 Paris trading days; closed period under MAR Art 19 runs 01–30 Jul (no dealings).
MNPI controls: selective disclosure prohibited; wall-crossing only upon clean list sign-off; permanent and temporary insiders to be recorded per MAR Art 18; insider list section “19—Funding” to be maintained.
GDPR/Privacy: PII includes names, business emails, and limited health data (works council sick‑leave statistics) from SolvaBright; lawful basis Art 6(1)(f) and Art 9(2)(b); cross-border transfer to Datacelica Pvt Ltd (IN) under 2021 SCCs with transfer impact assessment.
ESG/Use of proceeds: CSRD-aligned capex taxonomy reporting; SFDR PAI metrics draft in data room; sustainability-linked step-up +25 bps if Scope 2 intensity not reduced ≥12% by FY2028; internal policy GRID-ESG-12 applies.
Regulatory/Listing: Regulated Information to be disseminated via OAM and press wire; AMH and host NCA notifications; stabilization within Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052 safe harbour.
Public information (non-price-sensitive): 2025 Annual Report filed on 12 Apr 2026 in the OAM (public), and a 15 Apr 2026 press release on pilot product “FluxBridge Mini” remains historical and generic.
Acquisition terms (confidential): exclusivity until 30 Aug 2026; draft SPA earn‑out €10m; 15% vendor rollover; no announcement planned before signing; if leak occurs, immediate ad hoc disclosure via OAM.
Covenants/MAC: leverage covenant <3.0x net debt/EBITDA post-issue; no MAC shall be triggered by sector-wide carbon price volatility, routine supplier re‑tenders, or media speculation.
Governance/Contacts: Chair: Dr. Éva Markovic; CFO: Mr. Paolo Richter; contact: investor.relations@nuvoria-grid.eu; data room: https://docs.eu.example/f/term?deal=GLN-2026&trk=obf%2FZ9.
Identifiers (placeholders): LEI 0O00F1C T10N0LEI00000; proposed ISIN ZZ000-NUVO-2031-CNV; internal ref PRJ-LARK-α; soft wall-cross code: L4-R K;    b r o k e n   l i n e s.
Notes: This is not an offer; subject to Board approval on 24 Jun 2026; next sprint: draft q&a, align slides; earlier webshop update on spare inverters is operational and unrelated to securities.
